## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change that addresses it.

## Verification

List the commands or prompts used to verify the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is limited to one logical concern.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior or structure changed.
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally.
- [ ] Installation or usage documentation was updated when needed.
- [ ] The diff contains no secrets or personal information.
